title: John Cobb
compiled_truth: John Cobb is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-17 to 2002-02-21), John Cobb sent 11 and received 194 emails, totalling 205 interactions. Top correspondents: [James Saunders](people/james-saunders) (5), [Teb Lokey](people/teb-lokey) (5), [Timothy Bayles](people/timothy-bayles) (4), [Frank Carriere](people/frank-carriere) (3), [Tracy Geaccone](people/tracy-geaccone) (3).
